name: S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd.
summary: S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture, processing, import, and sale of coffee, tea, liquor, and food in Japan and internationally. It also exports and sells alcoholic beverages, food products, and confectionery products. The company handles coffee beans and tea for drinks; packaged products, including coffee and tea; canned fruits and vegetables; Western food ingredients, such as pasta and olive oil, and frozen foods; chicken related products; and seafoods comprising shrimps, squid, octopus, and others. It also imports and sells fresh vegetables and processed agricultural products to food manufacturers, cut vegetable suppliers, restaurant chains, mass retailers, etc. In addition, the company engages in the provision of Japanese alcoholic beverages, sake, shochu, etc.; and management of an Italian restaurant. S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture, processing, import, and sale of coffee, tea, liquor, and food in Japan and internationally.
